headline: Wall Street's Most Accurate Analysts Give Their Take On 3 Utilities Stocks With Over 3% Dividend Yields
summary: Investors seek dividend-yielding stocks in uncertain markets. Benzinga offers latest analyst ratings for top yielding stocks in utilities sector.
